text.en:
If your Army Faction is **LEGIONES DAEMONICA**, certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, as follows:

■ Your deployment zone is always within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.
■ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man’s Land, until the end of that phase, No Man’s Land is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.
■ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent’s deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent’s deployment zone is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.
DAEMONIC MANIFESTATION

While a **LEGIONES DAEMONICA** unit from your army is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a **BATTLELINE** unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead).
DAEMONIC TERROR

While an enemy unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos and/or it is within 6" of one or more **BLOODTHIRSTER**, **GREAT UNCLEAN ONE**, **KAIROS FATEWEAVER**, **KEEPER OF SECRETS**, **LORD OF CHANGE**, **ROTIGUS**, **SHALAXI HELBANE** or **SKARBRAND** units from your army, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from that test and, if that test is failed, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

If every model from your army has the **CHAOS KNIGHTS** or **HERETIC ASTARTES** keyword, you can include **LEGIONES DAEMONICA** units in your army, even if they do not have the Faction keyword you selected in the Select Army Faction step. The combined points cost of such units you can include depends on your battle size, as shown below.

■ Incursion - Up to 250 pts
■ Strike Force - Up to 500 pts
■ Onslaught - Up to 750 pts

None of these models can be your **WARLORD**, and they cannot be given Enhancements.

In addition, for each of the following keywords, the number of non-**BATTLELINE** units with that keyword you include in this way cannot be greater than the number of **BATTLELINE** units with that keyword you include in this way:

■ **KHORNE**
■ **TZEENTCH**
■ **NURGLE**
■ **SLAANESH**

In your opponent's movement phase, each time an enemy unit (excluding **AIRCRAFT**) ends a move within 8" of one or more **LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE** units from your army, one of those **LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE** units can make a **surge move** of up to D6".'

At the end of a phase in which a **LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE** unit from your army destroyed an enemy unit that was within range of an objective marker at the start of the phase, if your unit has a higher Level of Control over that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Each time a **LEGIONES DAEMONICA** unit from your army is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, and/or if it is set up wholly within 6" of one or more friendly **BLOODTHIRSTER**, **GREAT UNCLEAN ONE**, **KAIROS FATEWEAVER**, **KEEPER OF SECRETS**, **LORD OF CHANGE**, **ROTIGUS**, **SHALAXI HELBANE** or **SKARBRAND** units with which it shares the **KHORNE**, **TZEENTCH**, **NURGLE** or **SLAANESH** keyword, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, instead of more than 8".

While an enemy unit is within 9" of one or more **LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE** units from your army, that enemy unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. In each player’s Command phase, select one enemy unit within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test.
If your Army Faction is **LEGIONES DAEMONICA**, you can use this Shadow Legion Detachment rule.
First Prince of Chaos
Units from your army have the relevant abilities presented below.

*The most murderous seek not to hide in the Dark Master’s pall. The shadows extend before them, offering a rapid route to slaughter.*

**SHADOW LEGION KHORNE** units only. This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

*Mutative agents of change, touched by the Dark Master’s umbral aura, summon llusory magicks to confound and confuse their desperate foes.*

**SHADOW LEGION TZEENTCH** units only. This unit has **Stealth**. Each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

*Borne upon the gloaming wisp of Be’lakor’s shadow, this debilitating curse atrophies muscle and withers flesh, greatly weakening its victims.*

**SHADOW LEGION NURGLE** units only. Each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this unit’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

*The Dark Master’s shadow falls across his thralls, masking their approach.*

**SHADOW LEGION SLAANESH** units only. Enemy units cannot target this unit with snap shooting attacks.

*Be’lakor’s immortal ego draws into his orbit those as yet unclaimed by any one Chaos God. Their hate‐filled pacts are made to the entire fell pantheon, and the dangerous boons they receive see them plunged along paths of perpetual night straight into the enemy’s midst.*

**SHADOW LEGION UNDIVIDED** units only.
■ This unit has the Dark Pacts army rule, and can use it as described in *Codex: Chaos Space Marines*, even though your Army Faction is not **HERETIC ASTARTES**. If this unit is **BE’LAKOR**, it automatically passes the Leadership test required for Dark Pacts.
■ **SHADOW LEGION HERETIC ASTARTES** models in this unit have the Deep Strike ability.
If a friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit made a fall‑back move this turn, that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to shoot/eligible to declare a charge.
text.de: Wenn eine befreundete berittene Legiones-Daemonica-Einheit in diesem Zug eine Rückzugsbewegung ausgeführt hat, verhindert jene Bewegung nicht, dass jene Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen/einen Angriff anzusagen.
text.es: Si una unidad Montada Legiones Daemónicas amiga hizo algún movimiento de retroceder en este turno, esto no le impide ser apta para disparar/apta para declarar cargas.
text.fr: Si une unité montée des Legiones Daemonica amie a fait un mouvement de retraite à ce tour, ce dernier ne l’empêche pas d’être éligible pour tirer/éligible pour déclarer une charge.
text.it: Se un’unità In Sella delle Legiones Daemonica amica ha effettuato un movimento di ripiegamento in questo turno, quel movimento non impedisce a quell’unità di essere idonea a tirare/idonea a dichiarare una carica.
text.ja: 味方レギオネス・ディーモニカ・乗騎・ユニットがこのターン中に退却移動を行っていた場合でも、このユニットは射撃/突撃を宣言可能である。
text.ko: 아군 레기오네스 데모니카 기승 유닛이 이번 턴에 후퇴 이동을 수행했다면, 그 이동에도 불구하고 그 유닛은 사격 수행/돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
text.zh: 如果己方逆理魔军骑乘单位在本回合中进行了一次后撤移动，那么那次移动不会使那个单位不能进行射击/宣布冲锋。

text.en:
When a friendly Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit is selected to make an advance move:
  • That unit’s ranged attacks have [ASSAULT] until the end of the turn.
  • That move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
text.de:
Wenn eine Legiones-Daemonica-Linientruppen-Einheit zum Ausführen einer Vorrückenbewegung gewählt wird:
  • haben die Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit bis zum Ende des Zugs [STURM].
  • verhindert jene Bewegung nicht, dass jene Einheit infrage kommt, einen Angriff anzusagen.
text.es:
Cuando una unidad Línea de batalla Legiones Daemónicas amiga se elija para hacer un movimiento de avanzar:
  • Los ataques a distancia de esa unidad tienen [ASALTO] hasta el final del turno.
  • Ese movimiento no le impide a esa unidad ser apta para declarar cargas.
text.fr:
Quand une unité de Ligne des Legiones Daemonica amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance :
  • Les attaques de tir de l’unité ont [ASSAUT] jusqu’à la fin du tour.
  • Ce mouvement n’empêche pas l’unité d’être éligible pour entreprendre déclarer une charge.
text.it:
Quando un’unità Linea di Battaglia delle Legiones Daemonica amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata:
  • Gli attacchi da tiro di quell'unità hanno [Assalto] fino alla fine del turno.
  • Quel movimento non impedisce a quell’unità di essere idonea a dichiarare una carica.
text.ja:
味方レギオネス・ディーモニカ・バトルライン・ユニットが全力移動を宣言した時：
  • そのターン終了時まで、その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は［アサルト］を持つ。
  • そのユニットは突撃を宣言可能である。
text.ko:
아군 레기오네스 데모니카 전열 유닛이 급속 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
  • 턴이 종료될 때까지 그 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [기동 사격]을 부여합니다.
  • 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
text.zh:
当一个己方逆理魔军战线单位被选择进行一次突进移动时：
  • 在该回合结束前，那个单位的远程攻击拥有[突击]。
  • 那次移动不会阻止那个单位宣布冲锋。

text.en:
You start the battle with three Flux tokens (we recommend using a dice to track how many Flux tokens you have). You can spend one Flux token just after an Advance roll, Hit roll, Wound roll, Damage roll, saving throw or Hazardous test is made for a **LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH** model or **LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH** unit from your army to re‑roll the result of that roll, throw or test. Flux tokens can also be spent to enhance the effect of some Stratagems. Each time you spend a Flux token, reduce the number of Flux tokens you have by one and your opponent gains one Flux token.

Whenever your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, they can spend one Flux token after an Advance roll, Hit roll, Wound roll or saving throw is made for a model or unit from their army, to re‑roll the result of that roll or throw. If they do, they reduce the number of Flux tokens they have by one and you gain one Flux token. This is ignored if your opponent has the Fates in Flux Detachment rule.

In your Command phase, if your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, you gain one Flux token.

**Designer’s Note**: *When using fast dice rolling, this rule can be used to spend any number of Flux tokens (up to the amount you have), to re‑roll a number of dice up to the amount spent, after rolling multiple rolls or saving throws at once.*
**LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH** units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back.

**LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH** units from your army have the following ability:

**Seductive Gambit**: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, you can declare it will perform a Seductive Gambit. If you do, until the end of the turn, this unit does not have the Fights First ability, but instead, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re‐roll the Hit roll and you can re‐roll a Wound roll of 1.
Friendly Legiones Daemonica Character models (excluding Monster models) have +1 Ld and OC.
text.es: Las miniaturas Personaje Legiones Daemónicas amigas (Salvo Monstruo) tienen +1 a L y +1 a CO.
text.fr: Les figurines de Personnage des Legiones Daemonica amies (figurines de Monstre exclues) ont +1 en Cd et CO.
text.it: I modelli di Personaggio delle Legiones Daemonica amici (esclusi i modelli di Mostro) hanno +1 D e +1 CO.
text.ja: 味方レギオネス・ディーモニカ・キャラクター・兵（モンスター・兵を除く）は【統】に+1の修正を受け、【確】を持つ。
text.ko: 아군 레기오네스 데모니카 캐릭터 모델(괴수 모델 제외)에 통솔 및 장악 +1을 적용합니다.
text.zh: 己方逆理魔军角色模型（凶兽模型除外)拥有 +1 Ld 和 OC。

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a Save characteristic of 3+.

fluff.en: The scorn of these daemons for the blasts and blades of the weakling foe manifests as flowing brass armour that enfolds their corporeal forms and denies all but the most dolorous blows.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1. In addition, until the end of the phase, each time such a weapon targets a unit that is Battle-shocked, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: The swelling fear of their mortal prey serves as an intoxicating elixir to the daemonic followers, each draught invigorating their forms with deadly power.

target.en: Up to two **LEGIONES DAEMONICA** units from your army that are within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, or one other **LEGIONES DAEMONICA** unit from your army.

when.en: End of your opponent’s turn.

effect.en: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. They will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability.

restrictions.en: You cannot target units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units with this Stratagem.

fluff.en: When the energies of the warp bleed into realspace, the Legiones Daemonica can rip open portals in seeming thin-air, returning to their hellscapes only to rematerialise amidst their foes a heartbeat later.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of that enemy unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an invulnerable saving throw is made for a model in your unit, re-roll a saving throw of 1.

fluff.en: Daemons are madness given form. Their very bodies are fashioned from the stuff of the warp, and are difficult to destroy through conventional means.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: Repugnant filth wells from the weapons, gaping maws and open wounds of these daemons, slopping across the foe and causing swift and virulent rot wherever it finds the slightest way in.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. After your unit has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

fluff.en: A plague of waking nightmares races through the enemy ranks, leaving foes reeling in the grip of nauseating visions that curdle into soul-destroying reality.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE INFANTRY** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal move, add 5" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: With the battlefield swathed in an occluding miasma of unreality, Nurgle’s daemons may loom out of the haze, solidify from amidst thrumming fly clouds or even rise out of the filth without warning.

target.en: One **SHADOW LEGION** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds. In addition, If your unit has the **TZEENTCH** keyword, return up to one destroyed model (excluding **CHARACTER** models) to your unit with its full wounds remaining.

fluff.en: Even death does not free one from Be’lakor’s grasp. Those who disappoint him may be dragged back through the veil, granted one last chance to impress their master or face the full extent of his wrath.

target.en: Up to one **SHADOW LEGION HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army and up to one **SHADOW LEGION LEGIONES DAEMONICA** unit from your army. You can only select units that arrived from Reserves this turn.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your selected units have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

fluff.en: Be’lakor’s aura falls across the field of battle, bearing servants both mortal and daemonic to war. Attuned to the gloom, these new arrivals combine their fire to unleash death upon the cowering foe.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight that phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by models in your unit, or spend one Flux token and add 3 to the Strength characteristic of those weapons and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1 instead.

fluff.en: Warpflame is as changeable as the monsters who wield it, capable of easily burning through ceramite plates or reinforced hulls when desired.

target.en: That **LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH** unit.

when.en: Your Charge phase, just after a **LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH** unit from your army ends a Charge move.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, or roll six D6 instead if your unit is a **MONSTER** unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fluff.en: The cavorting approach of Slaaneshi daemons is hypnotic and enthralling. It is a whirling carousel of eye‑searing colours and flashing blades that tempt mortals to reach out with trembling eagerness until they can just reach.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Sensation gushes relentlessly into the overstimulated minds of the enemy until their souls strain fit to burst. Barely able to think or function, they recoil in their desperate need to stem the unstoppable tide.

target.en: One friendly **SHADOW LEGION** unit.

when.en: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. When that enemy unit declares a charge, that enemy unit has -1 to charge rolls. If your unit has **Nurgle**, that enemy unit must make a battle-shock roll.

fluff.en: A chill penumbra settles over the oncoming foe. Those that manage to cut their way through the blanket of twilight find themselves seized with terror as the darkness parts and the horrific nature of their enemy is revealed.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH MONSTER** unit or up to two **LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH** units (excluding **MONSTERS**) from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of those units makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: These daemons perceive with absolute clarity whereabouts on their victims’ bodies they must strike to inflict the greatest possible excess of suffering.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE** unit from your army that has not been selected to charge this phase.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: The iron reek of mortal blood pulsing through living veins fires the unnatural senses of Khorne’s daemons, drawing them on all the swifter to tear, slay, and hack skulls from necks for mighty Khorne.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Even the banishing blow is often not enough to prevent the daemons of Khorne from lashing out to take bloody vengeance as they discorporate.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

fluff.en: The manifest will to run down and slaughter their prey allows the daemons of Khorne to surge through physical barriers as though they did not exist, falling upon their victims like bloody phantasms.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE INFANTRY** or **LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE MOUNTED** unit from your army (excluding units that Fell Back this turn) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fluff.en: Torn from the wet and ragged necks of worthy mortal champions, these skulls blaze with balefire as the daemons of Khorne heft and hurl them. They explode amongst the foe to shed more blood for the Blood God.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA** unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Start of any Command phase.

effect.en: That objective marker is said to be Corrupted and remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. In addition, while an objective marker is Corrupted and under your control, the area of the battlefield within 6" of that objective marker is considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

fluff.en: Daemons instinctively feel the need to despoil and corrupt every corner of realspace, the better to sustain their otherworldly forms.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA** unit from your army that is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: The winds of the warp blow strong, invigorating daemonkind and lending them supernatural speed and ferocity.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA** unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.

fluff.en: Ever lurking in the warp, daemons will wait until the barriers between realms thin before tearing their way into realspace.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

fluff.en: Rather than lumber across the battlefield, these daemons rot away to nothing before hatching anew from canker blooms wherever they wish to be.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE** unit from your army.

when.en: Your opponent’s Command phase, before selecting any targets for the Melancholic Miasma Detachment rule.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, after an enemy unit takes a Battle‑shock test as a result of the Melancholic Miasma Detachment rule, select one other enemy unit within 9" of your unit; that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

fluff.en: Even as one band of foes gives in to despair, their sorrows spread like a virus to the minds and souls of others, the enemy’s woes multiplying by the moment.

target.en: That **SHADOW LEGION** unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase, just after a **SHADOW LEGION** unit from your army is destroyed, before removing the last model in that unit from the battlefield and before rolling any dice for the Deadly Demise ability.

effect.en: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit that is within Engagement Range of the last model in your unit, adding 2 to the result if your unit has the **SLAANESH** keyword: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

fluff.en: Malevolent to the last, Be’lakor’s thralls expend their final reserves of mortal strength and empyric might in an act of vengeance, unleashing torrents of killing energy in all directions.

target.en: One **SHADOW LEGION** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LANCE]** ability. If your unit has the **KHORNE** keyword, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1 as well.

fluff.en: Khorne may not care whence the blood flows, but Be’lakor is more discerning. He directs his slaughter-crazed followers to strike the most pressing targets with all their infernal fury.

target.en: Up to one **SHADOW LEGION HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army and up to one **SHADOW LEGION LEGIONES DAEMONICA** unit from your army. You can only select units that are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove those selected units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: Bound by coils of umbral energy, mortal and daemonic followers are swept up in Be’lakor’s cloak of shadows as pawns returned to their master’s hand.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH MONSTER** unit from your army that is on the battlefield.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Select No Man’s Land or your opponent’s deployment zone, or spend one Flux token and select both. Until the end of the phase, the selected areas of the battlefield are within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

fluff.en: At the call of this malevolent entity, invisible stellar bodies slide into alignment, plunging the battlefield into momentary twilight, dancing with strange and sorcerous will–o’-the-wisps.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en:
Roll one D6, then you can spend one Flux token to re‑roll the result: until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, on an unmodified Hit roll (after any re‑roll) of that result, the attack sequence ends, even if the original Hit roll would have been a Critical Hit.

**Example**: *If you roll a 2 and choose to spend one Flux token to re-roll the result, and the re-roll is a 6, then until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, on an unmodified Hit roll of 6 the attack sequence ends, that attack fails to hit and no Critical Hit effects (e.g. Lethal Hits) are resolved.*

fluff.en: The very stuff of reality flickers like a candle flame in a gale, frustrating even the most skilful sworders as they strike at rippling illusions.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

fluff.en: Barred doors, reinforced windows, or walls are no barriers to the children of the Warp. They cannot be outrun; they cannot be hidden from; they cannot be stopped.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH** unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets for, and resolving attacks with, ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model is destroyed while its unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

fluff.en: These daemons care little for who they engulf in their infernal fires, only that destruction and chaos are wrought.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. Alternatively, you can spend one Flux token when you use this Stratagem and target up to two **LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH** units from your army instead (including those within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units).

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: Between one heartbeat and the next, the daemons of Tzeentch vanish as though they were never there. Yet this jarring respite will last only long enough for their victims to question their sanity before the onslaught begins anew.

target.en: That **LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH** unit.

when.en: Any phase, just after an attack or mortal wound is allocated to a model in a **LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH** unit from your army (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**).

effect.en: Select one other friendly **LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH** unit that is within 9" of and visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, while the selected unit is on the battlefield, each time a model in your unit would lose a wound, inflict 1 mortal wound on the selected unit instead.

fluff.en: To exist, however fleetingly, in realspace is an opportunity to indulge in every physical sensation. So enraptured do the daemons of Slaanesh become that they even steal one another’s agonies to enjoy.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH MONSTER** unit from your army that is on the battlefield.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en:
Each unit on the battlefield that is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if they are Below Half‑strength.

**Designer’s Note**: *This Stratagem forces all friendly and enemy units alike within your army’s Shadow of Chaos to take a Battle‑shock test. This can allow a Chaos Daemons player to heal units from their army through the Daemonic Terror army rule, at the risk of causing some of their own units to become Battle‑shocked.*

fluff.en: This entity causes the battlefield to flicker wildly between the debauched Slaaneshi Warp interstice and the most brutally mundane reality, faster than even supernatural senses can perceive. The result is a psychically devastating barrage of excess and deprivation.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

fluff.en: Against their wills, enemy combatants find themselves wishing for the daemons of Slaanesh to draw closer. It is child’s play for the daemons of Slaanesh to harness such strong emotions and transform them into manifest reality.

target.en: One friendly unengaged **LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE** unit that is within 6" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a **fall‑back move**.

effect.en: Declare a charge with your unit. When selecting **charge targets**, you can only select enemy units that made a **fall‑back move** this phase and are within the **maximum distance**.

fluff.en: Khorne’s daemons know only hatred and contempt for those who flee from combat and will distort reality itself to keep such cowards trapped in the endless battle they sought to escape.

target.en: One **LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE** unit from your army that is on the battlefield.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Return up to 1 destroyed model to your unit, or up to D3 destroyed models instead if your unit is a **BATTLELINE** unit, with their full wounds remaining. If it is a **MONSTER** unit, one model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds instead.

fluff.en: As the power of the Plague God saturates the battlefield, fresh daemonic life blooms from the septic corpse mulch that bubbles underfoot.

target.en: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit in strategic reserves.
target.es: 1 unidad Montada Legiones Daemónicas amiga que esté en la reserva estratégica.
target.fr: Une unité montée des Legiones Daemonica amie en réserve stratégique.
target.it: Un’unità In Sella delle Legiones Daemonica amica nelle riserve strategiche.
target.ja: 戦略的予備戦力に配置されている味方レギオネス・ディーモニカ・騎乗・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 전략 예비대에 편성된 아군 레기오네스 데모니카 기승 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一个位于战略预备队中的己方逆理魔军骑乘单位。

when.en: End of the Movement phase, from the start of the battle.
when.de: Ende der Bewegungsphase, ab Beginn der Schlacht
when.es: Al final de la fase de movimiento, desde el inicio de la batalla.
when.fr: À la fin de la phase de Mouvement, à partir du début de la bataille.
when.it: Alla fine della fase di Movimento, dall’inizio della battaglia.
when.ja: バトル開始以降、移動フェイズ終了時。
when.ko: 전투 시작부터 이동 페이즈 종료 시.
when.zh: 从战斗开始，移动阶段结束时。

effect.en: Your unit can make an ingress move.
effect.es: Tu unidad hace un movimiento de inserción.
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement d’arrivée.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento di inserzione.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは突入移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 진입 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次入场移动。

fluff.en: Erupting from a rippling warp portal, the cavalry of the Chaos Gods fall upon their shocked foes as though manifesting from nowhere.
fluff.de: Die Kavallerie der Chaosgötter galoppiert wie aus dem Nichts aus einem tosenden Warpportal hervor und fällt über ihre verängstigten Feinde her.
fluff.es: Surgiendo de un portal disforme ondulante, la caballería de los Dioses del Caos cae sobre sus atónitos enemigos como si surgiera de la nada.
fluff.fr: Surgissant d’un portail warp ondulant, la cavalerie des Dieux du Chaos s’abat sur des ennemis stupéfaits comme si elle sortait ne nulle part.
fluff.it: La cavalleria degli Dei del Caos emerge da uno sfrigolante portale warp e si abbatte sui nemici sorpresi come se apparisse dal nulla.
fluff.ja: ざわめく〈歪み〉の門から涌き出る渾沌神の騎兵は、無から現れたかのごとく、驚き戸惑う敵を急襲する。
fluff.ko: 파문이 이는 워프 차원문에서 카오스 신의 기병대가 뛰쳐나와 넋이 나간 상대를 집어삼킨다.
fluff.zh: 仿佛无中生有，混沌诸神的骑兵部队从闪烁的传送门中冲出，向震惊的敌人发起进攻。

target.en: That <k>Legiones Daemonica Mounted</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>レギオネス・ディーモニカ・騎乗</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>逆理魔军骑乘</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when a unit is selected to make a fall‑back move, if that unit is engaged with a friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen, und sich jene Einheit im Nahkampf mit einer befreundeten berittenen Legiones-Daemonica-Einheit befindet
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad se elige para hacer un movimiento de retroceder, si esa unidad está trabada con una unidad Montada Legiones Daemónicas amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite, si elle est engagée avec une unité montée des Legiones Daemonica amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento, se quell’unità è ingaggiata con un’unità In Sella delle Legiones Daemonica amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、味方レギオネス・ディーモニカ・騎乗・ユニットと接敵状態であるユニットが退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 아군 레기오네스 데모니카 유닛과 교전 상태인 유닛이 후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段中，当一个单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时，且那个单位与一个己方逆理魔军骑乘单位处于交战状态。

effect.en: When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a fall‑back move, that enemy unit must use the desperate escape mode. If that enemy unit is battle‑shocked, -1 from those hazard rolls.
effect.de: Wenn eine feindliche Einheit im Nahkampf mit deiner Einheit für das Ausführen einer Rückzugsbewegung gewählt wird, muss jene Einheit den Modus verzweifelte Flucht benutzen. Wenn jene feindliche Einheit erschüttert ist hat sie -1 auf jene Risikowürfe.
effect.es: Siempre que una unidad enemiga trabada con tu unidad se elige para hacer un movimiento de retroceder, esa unidad enemiga debe usar el modo de huida desesperada. Si esa unidad enemiga está acobardada, resta 1 a esas tiradas de riesgo.
effect.fr: Quand une unité ennemie engagée avec votre unité est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite, l’unité ennemie doit utiliser le mode fuite désespérée. Si l’unité ennemie est ébranlée, elle a -1 à ces jets de risque.
effect.it: Quando un’unità nemica ingaggiata con la tua unità viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento, quell’unità nemica deve usare la modalità fuga disperata. Se quell’unità nemica è traumatizzata, ha -1 a quei tiri pericolo.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニットが退却移動を行った時、その敵ユニットは決死の脱出モードを使用しなければならない。その敵ユニットが戦闘ショック状態である場合、それらの危機ロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛과 교전 상태인 적 유닛 하나가 후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때, 그 적 유닛은 반드시 필사적인 탈출 하부 유형을 선택해야 합니다. 그 적 유닛이 전투충격 상태라면, 위험 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 在一个与您的单位处于交战状态的敌方单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时，那个敌方单位必须使用狼狈逃亡模式。如果那个敌方单位处于战斗震慑状态，那么进行的危险掷骰 -1。

fluff.en: It is no easy matter to escape this thundering warp‑spawned cavalcade, and those who try are likely to be ridden down by howling daemons.
fluff.de: Es ist nicht gerade leicht, einer wogenden aus dem Warp geborenen Kavalkade zu entfliehen. Wer es dennoch versucht, wird wahrscheinlich von den kreischenden Dämonen niedergeritten.
fluff.es: No es fácil escapar de esta atronadora cabalgata generada por la disformidad, y quienes lo intenten probablemente serán aniquilados por daemons aulladores.
fluff.fr: Il est peu aisé d’échapper à cette cavalcade engendrée par le Warp, et ceux qui s’y risquent ont toutes les chances de finir piétinés par ces démons hurlants.
fluff.it: Non è facile sfuggire a questa tonante cavalleria corrotta, e chi ci prova viene inseguito da ululanti demoni.
fluff.ja: 轟音と共に現れた〈歪み〉生まれの騎行団から逃れるのは、一筋縄ではいかない。逃走を試みる者は、唸り声を上げるディーモンたちに蹂躙されることになるのだ。
fluff.ko: 벼락처럼 몰려오는 워프의 존재들에게서 벗어나기란 쉬운 일이 아니다. 그런 시도는 대개 포효하는 데몬에게 짓밟히는 것으로 끝난다.
fluff.zh: 想要远离这些来自亚空间的骑士并非易事，那些尝试逃跑的敌人很有可能被嚎叫的恶魔扑倒。

target.en: That <k>Legiones Daemonica Mounted</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>レギオネス・ディーモニカ・騎乗</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>逆理魔军骑乘</k>单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit is selected to move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine berittene Legiones-Daemonica-Einheit zum Bewegen gewählt wird.
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Montada Legiones Daemónicas amiga se elige para mover.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité montée des Legiones Daemonica amie est choisie pour se déplacer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità In Sella delle Legiones Daemonica amica viene scelta per muoversi.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方レギオネス・ディーモニカ・騎乗・ユニットが移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 레기오네스 데모니카 기승 유닛이 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方逆理魔军骑乘单位被选择进行移动时。

effect.en: Your unit has <k>Mobile</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは<k>高機動</k>を持つ。

fluff.en: Thundering along the spectral ways of the Warp, these infernal riders pass through solid matter like spectres out of some voidsman’s gheist story.
fluff.de: Diese finsteren Reiter galoppieren auf den unwirklichen Pfaden des Warp und passieren festes Gestein wie Gespenster aus dem Seemannsgarn eines Raumfahrers.
fluff.es: Retumbando por los caminos espectrales de la disformidad, estos jinetes infernales atraviesan la materia sólida como espectros salidos de una historia fantasmal.
fluff.fr: Galopant sur les sentiers spectraux du Warp, ces cavaliers infernaux traversent la matière tangible tels les spectres d’une histoire de fantômes de Cosmomarins.
fluff.it: Questi cavalieri infernali percorrono i sentieri del Warp, attraversando la materia solida come se fossero spettri di una ballata di vecchi vuotonauti.
fluff.ja: 亡霊のように移ろう〈歪み〉の道を、魔の騎手たちは轟音と共に駆け抜ける。そして、宇宙船員の怪談に登場する幽鬼のように、物質をすり抜けて迫り来るのだ。
fluff.ko: 워프의 심령 가도를 내달리는 지옥 기병대는 단단한 장애물도 쉬이 통과해버리니, 그 모습이 마치 공허병의 괴담에서나 나올 법한 망령과 같다.
fluff.zh: 这些地狱骑士沿着亚空间幽灵般的道路轰鸣而过，如同从虚空生物的故事中走出来的幽灵一般，穿过固体物质。

target.en: One friendly <k>Legiones Daemonica Battleline</k> unit.
target.es: 1 unidad <k>Línea de batalla Legiones Daemónicas</k> amiga.
target.fr: Une unité de <k>Ligne</k> des <k>Legiones Daemonica</k> amie.
target.ja: 味方<k>レギオネス・ディーモニカ・バトルライン</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>逆理魔军战线</k>单位。

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.
when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.
effect.de: Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12". Jene feindliche Einheit hat +6" Entdeckungsreichweite.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga visible para tu unidad y a 12" o menos de ella. Esa unidad enemiga tiene +6" al alcance de detección.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins de votre unité. L’unité ennemie choisie a +6" en portée de détection.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica visibile entro 12" dalla tua unità. Quell’unità nemica ha +6" alla distanza di individuazione.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 아군 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어오는 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于该单位 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位的侦测范围 +6"。

fluff.en: Like candles dancing in a darkened room, the animus of the daemons’ victims cannot be hidden from their infernal sight.
fluff.de: Wie flackernde Kerzen in einem dunklen Raum kann der Animus der Opfer dieser Dämons nicht vor ihren infernalen Blicken verborgen bleiben.
fluff.es: Como velas danzando en una habitación oscura, el animus de las víctimas de los daemons es inamovible ante su mirada infernal.
fluff.fr: Telle la lueur de bougies dansant dans une pièce sombre, l'âme des victimes des démons ne peut se soustraire à leur vision infernale.
fluff.it: Gli spiriti delle vittime dei demoni brillano come candele in una stanza buia e non possono nascondersi alla loro vista infernale.
fluff.ja: 暗闇で揺れる蝋燭のように、悪魔の犠牲者の魂はその視界から隠れることができない。
fluff.ko: 어두침침한 방안에서도 환하게 일렁이는 촛불처럼, 희생양들의 영도 그처럼 보이는 터라 데몬의 사악한 시선에서 벗어날 재간이 없다.
fluff.zh: 如同在黑暗房间中闪烁的蜡烛一样，猎物的灵魂无法在恶魔的不洁视觉中被隐藏。

target.en: That <k>Legiones Daemonica Battleline</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>Línea de batalla Legiones Daemónicas</k>.
target.ja: その<k>レギオネス・ディーモニカ・バトルライン</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>逆理魔军战线</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Legiones Daemonica Battleline</k> unit.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Legiones</k>-<k>Daemonica</k>-<k>Linientruppen</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco una unidad <k>Línea de batalla Legiones Daemónicas</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Ligne</k> des <k>Legiones Daemonica</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica ha come bersaglio un’unità <k>Linea di Battaglia</k> delle <k>Legiones Daemonica</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>レギオネス・ディーモニカ・バトルライン</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>레기오네스 데모니카 전열</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>逆理魔军战线</k>单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Ranged attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have ‑1 to wound rolls.
effect.de: Fernkampfattacken gegen deine Einheit mit einer S, die höher ist als der W deiner Einheit, haben -1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia que tomen como blanco tu unidad con una F mayor que la R de tu unidad tienen -1 a las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir qui ciblent votre unité avec une F supérieure à son E ont ‑1 aux jets de blessure.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità con una Fo maggiore della R della tua unità hanno -1 ai tiri per ferire.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを対象とした射撃攻撃の【攻】が、その自軍ユニットの【耐】を上回っている場合、その攻撃のウーンズロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 원거리 공격의 위력이 이 유닛의 내구보다 높다면, 그 공격에 타격 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 当对您的单位进行的远程攻击的 S 属性大于该单位的 T 属性时，攻击的致伤掷骰结果 -1。

fluff.en: No matter how potent the weapons turned against them, the ephemeral forms of these daemons seem almost to exist in a different realm of reality than their blasts and projectiles.
fluff.de: So mächtig die gegen sie eingesetzten Waffen auch sein mögen, die halbdurchlässigen Gestalten dieser Dämonen scheinen auf einer anderen Ebene der Realität als die Projektile und Explosionen zu existieren.
fluff.es: Por muy potentes que sean las armas utilizadas contra ellos, las efímeras formas de estos daemons parecen existir en un reino de la realidad distinto al de sus explosiones y proyectiles.
fluff.fr: Qu'importe la puissance des armes tournées contre elles, les formes éphémères de ces démons semblent exister dans un plan de la réalité différent de celui des projectiles.
fluff.it: Indipendentemente da quanto siano potenti le armi che si trovano davanti, i corpi eterei di questi demoni paiono esistere in un reame della realtà diverso da quello dei proiettili.
fluff.ja: 朧げな影のようなディーモンの姿は、いかに強力な武器を向けられようとも、砲撃や弾丸とはまるで異なる層の現実に存在しているかのように見える。
fluff.ko: 제아무리 강력한 무기로 상대한다 해도, 이 데몬의 임시 형상은 그 무기의 발사체와 폭발하고는 전혀 다른 차원에 존재하는 듯하다.
fluff.zh: 无论被多么强大的武器攻击，这些恶魔的虚无实体似乎与敌人的枪弹处在不同的现实位面。

target.en: One friendly <k>Legiones Daemonica Battleline</k> unit (excluding <k>PINK HORRORS</k> units).
target.es: Una unidad <k>Línea de batalla Legiones Daemónicas</k> amiga (excepto <k>HORRORES ROSA</k>).
target.fr: Une unité de <k>Ligne</k> des <k>Legiones Daemonica</k> amie (unités d’<k>Horreurs Roses</k> exclues).
target.it: Un’unità <k>Linea di Battaglia</k> delle <k>Legiones Daemonica</k> amica (escluse le unità di <k>Orrori Rosa</k>).
target.ja: 味方<k>レギオネス・ディーモニカ・バトルライン</k>・ユニット（<k>ピンクホラー</k>・ユニットを除く）1個。
target.ko: 아군 <k>레기오네스 데모니카 전열</k> 유닛(<k>분홍귀</k> 유닛 제외) 하나.
target.zh: 一个己方<k>逆理魔军战线</k>单位（<k>粉色惧妖</k>单位除外)。

when.en: Your Command phase.
when.ja: 自軍側指揮フェイズ中。

effect.en: Your unit heals 3 wounds.
effect.de: Deine Einheit wird um bis zu 3 Lebenspunkte geheilt.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは【負傷限界】を3ポイント回復する。
effect.zh: 您的单位 治疗 3 处耐伤。

fluff.en: Manifesting in great numbers and flowing through and around one another almost like a single unholy entity, the footsoldiers of the daemon legions appear to be everywhere at once.
fluff.de: In großer Zahl nehmen die Fußsoldaten der dämonischen Legionen Gestalt an und fließen um- und durcheinander, als wären sie ein einziges unheilvolles Wesen, das überall zugleich zu sein scheint.
fluff.es: Manifestándose en gran número y moviéndose casi como una sola entidad impía, los soldados de infantería de las legiones daemónicas parecen estar en todas partes a la vez.
fluff.fr: Manifestés en grand nombre et grouillant les uns par-dessus les autres telle une seule entité impie, les fantassins des légions démoniaques semblent se trouver partout à la fois.
fluff.it: Manifestandosi in vaste schiere e sciamando fra e attraverso i compagni come una singola entità blasfema, la soldataglia delle legioni demoniache sembra essere ovunque allo stesso tempo.
fluff.ja: 無数に顕現しつつ、それでいて一体の不浄なる存在であるかのように、ディーモンの歩兵たちは姿を現す。互いをすり抜け、あるいは絡み合うようなその動きは、戦場の至るところで同時に存在するかのような錯覚をもたらす。
fluff.ko: 감히 헤아릴 수조차 없는 규모의 불경한 존재들이 마치 한 몸이 된 것처럼 우후죽순 나타난다. 그야말로 사방팔방에 데몬 군단의 병졸들이 포진해있는 듯하다.
fluff.zh: 恶魔军团的步卒大批显现，彼此交织穿梭，仿佛化作了一个单一的邪恶实体；放眼望去，它们似乎无处不在，同时现身于每一个角落。

target.en: One friendly <k>Legiones Daemonica Character Nurgle</k> unit (excluding <k>Monster</k> units).
target.fr: Une unité de <k>Personnage</k> de <k>Nurgle</k> des <k>Legiones Daemonica</k> amie (unités de <k>Monstre</k> exclues).
target.it: Un’unità <k>Personaggio</k> delle <k>Legiones Daemonica</k> di <k>Nurgle</k> amica (escluse le unità <k>Mostro</k>).
target.ja: 味方<k>レギオネス・ディーモニカ・ナーグル・キャラクター</k>・ユニット1個（<k>モンスター</k>・ユニットを除く）。
target.ko: 아군 <k>레기오네스 데모니카 캐릭터 너글</k> 유닛(<k>괴수</k> 유닛 제외)
target.zh: 一个己方<k>逆理魔军角色纳垢</k>单位（<k>凶兽</k>单位除外）。

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.
when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en:
Select one visible enemy unit within 8" of your unit and roll seven D6:
  • For each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
effect.de:
Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 8" und wirf sieben W6:
  • Für jede 4+ erleidet jene feindliche Einheit 1 tödliche Verwundung.
effect.es:
Elige 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 8" o menos de tu unidad y tira siete D6:
  • Por cada 4+, esa unidad enemiga sufre 1 herida mortal.
effect.fr:
Choisissez une unité ennemie visible et à 8" ou moins de votre unité, puis jetez sept D6 :
  • Pour chaque jet de 4+, l’unité ennemie choisie subit 1 blessure mortelle.
effect.it:
Scegli un’unità nemica visibile entro 8" dalla tua unità e tira sette D6:
  • Per ogni 4+ quell’unità nemica subisce 1 ferita mortale.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択し、D6を7個ロールする：
  • ロール結果で4+が出るごとに、その敵ユニットは1ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 8" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. D6를 7개 굴립니다.
  • 값이 4+이면, 그 적 유닛이 1 치명상을 입습니다.
effect.zh:
选择一个位于您的单位 8" 内且可见的敌方单位。掷七枚 D6:
  • 每有一个结果为 4+，那个敌方单位便受到 1 处致命伤。

fluff.en: With a peristaltic heave, this repulsive daemon champion vomits a stream of nauseating filth across the foe.
fluff.de: Mit einem krampfhaften Würgen speit dieser abscheuliche Dämonenchampion einen Strahl erbrochenen Schmutzes auf den Feind.
fluff.es: Con un movimiento peristáltico, este repulsivo campeón daemon vomita un torrente de inmundicia nauseabunda sobre el enemigo.
fluff.fr: Dans un soulèvement péristaltique, ce champion démoniaque répugnant vomit un flot d'immondices sur l'ennemi.
fluff.it: Con un singulto questo orribile campione demoniaco vomita un flusso di lordura disgustosa sul nemico.
fluff.ja: この醜悪なる悪魔の闘士は、脈動する痙攣とともに、おぞましき腐臭の奔流を敵に浴びせかける。
fluff.ko: 요동치며 들썩이는가 싶더니, 이 역겨운 데몬 용사는 적에게 메스꺼운 오물을 잔뜩 토해낸다.
fluff.zh: 伴随着一阵蠕动的剧烈抽搐，这名令人作呕的恶魔勇士向敌人喷吐出一股令人作呕的污秽洪流。

target.en: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Character Slaanesh unit (excluding Monster units) that has not been selected to fight this phase.
target.de: Eine befreundete Legiones-Daemonica-Charaktermodell-Slaanesh-Einheit (ausgenommen Monster-Einheiten), die in dieser Phase noch nicht zum Kämpfen gewählt wurde
target.es: 1 unidad Slaanesh Personaje Legiones Daemónicas amiga (salvo Monstruo) que no se haya elegido para combatir en esta fase.
target.fr: Une unité de Personnage de Slaanesh des Legiones Daemonica amie (unités de Monstre exclues) qui n’a pas été choisie pour combattre à cette phase.
target.it: Un’unità Personaggio delle Legiones Daemonica di Slaanesh amica (escluse le unità Mostro) che non è stata scelta per combattere in questa fase.
target.ja: このフェイズ中に、白兵を宣言していない味方レギオネス・ディーモニカ・スラーネッシュ・キャラクター・ユニット（モンスター・ユニットを除く）1個。
target.ko: 이번 페이즈에 백병전 수행을 위해 지정되지 않은 레기오네스 데모니카 캐릭터 슬라네쉬 유닛(괴수 유닛 제외) 하나.
target.zh: 一个在本阶段中还没有被选择进行近战的己方逆理魔军角色色孽单位（凶兽单位除外）。

when.en: Fight phase, when an enemy unit has fought.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit gekämpft hat
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga haya combatido.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie a combattu.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, dopo che un’unità nemica ha combattuto.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが白兵を行った直後。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 백병전 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位完成近战后。

effect.en: Your unit has Fights First and must be the next unit you select to fight.
effect.de: Deine Einheit hat die Fähigkeit Erstschlag und sie muss die nächste Einheit sein, die du zum Kämpfen wählst
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene Combatir Primero y debe ser la siguiente unidad que elijas para combatir.
effect.fr: Votre unité a Combat en Premier et doit être la prochaine unité que vous choisissez pour combattre.
effect.it: La tua unità ha Combatte per Prima e deve essere la prossima unità che scegli per combattere.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは『先手』を持つ。自軍は、次にそのユニットで白兵を宣言しなければならない。
effect.ko: 이 유닛에 선제공격 능력을 부여하며, 다음 백병전 수행을 위해 지정하는 유닛은 반드시 이 유닛이어야 합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位拥有先攻技能，并且必须是下一个被您选择进行近战的单位。

fluff.en: Whirling wildly through the fight, shrieking with unholy glee and excitement, the daemonic servants of Slaanesh compete to unleash the greatest excesses of elegant violence.
fluff.de: Die dämonischen Dienerinnen des Slaanesh wirbeln in erquickt kreischenden Pirouetten durch den Kampf und wetteifern darum, wer exzessivere und elegantere Gewalt entfesselt.
fluff.es: Revoloteando salvajemente por la batalla y chillando con alegría y excitación impías, los siervos daemónicos de Slaanesh compiten por desatar los mayores excesos de violencia.
fluff.fr: Les serviteurs démoniaques de Slaanesh tourbillonnent en mêlée tout de façon jubilatoire tandis qu’ils rivalisent pour perpétrer la violence la plus excessive et élégante à la fois.
fluff.it: I servitori demoniaci di Slaanesh turbinano in mezzo al combattimento, strillando di empia gioia ed esaltazione, e fanno a gara nel compiere le più eleganti efferatezze.
fluff.ja: 戦いの中を狂乱のごとく舞い、背徳の歓喜に金切り声を上げつつ、スラーネッシュの悪魔たちは洗練された残虐の限界を競って誇示する。
fluff.ko: 불경한 희열과 흥분에 괴성을 내지르며 거칠게 전장으로 휘몰아치는 슬라네쉬의 데몬 종복들은 서로 경쟁적으로 우아한 폭력의 향연을 펼치려 든다.
fluff.zh: 在激战之中狂乱飞舞，发出充满邪恶狂喜与亢奋的尖啸，色孽的恶魔仆从们竞相施展着极尽奢靡的优雅暴力。

target.en: That <k>Legiones Daemonica Character Khorne</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Personnage</k> de <k>Khorne</k> des <k>Legiones Daemonica</k>.
target.ja: その<k>レギオネス・ディーモニカ・キャラクター・コーン</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>逆理魔军角色恐虐</k>单位。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Legiones Daemonica Khorne Character unit (excluding Monster units) that made a charge move this turn is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine Legiones-Daemonica-Khorne-Charaktermodell-Einheit (ausgenommen Monster-Einheiten), die in diesem Zug eine Angriffsbewegung ausgeführt hat, zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Personaje Khorne Legiones Daemónicas amiga (salvo Monstruo) que haya hecho algún movimiento de carga en este turno se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Personnage de Khorne des Legiones Daemonica amie (unités de Monstre exclues) qui a fait un mouvement de charge à ce tour est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Personaggio delle Legiones Daemonica di Khorne amica (escluse le unità Mostro) che ha effettuato un movimento di carica in questo turno viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、このターン中に突撃移動を行った味方レギオネス・ディーモニカ・コーン・キャラクター・ユニット（モンスター・ユニットを除く）が白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 이번 턴에 돌격 이동을 수행한 아군 레기오네스 데모니카 코온 캐릭터 유닛(괴수 유닛 제외)이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个在该回合中进行过冲锋移动的己方逆理魔军恐虐角色单位（凶兽单位除外）被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have +1 A.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen +1 a A.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont +1 en A.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno +1 A.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃の【数】は+1の修正を受ける。
effect.zh: 您的单位的近战攻击拥有 +1 A。

fluff.en: This champion’s very war cry erupts from their maw as a brazen horn call that summons Khorne’s servants to battle.
fluff.de: Der Schlachtruf dieses Champions ertönt wie ein röhrendes Messinghorn aus seinem Mund, das Khornes Diener ins Gefecht treibt.
fluff.es: El grito de guerra de este campeón brota de sus fauces como de un cuerno de bronce que convoca a los siervos de Khorne a la batalla.
fluff.fr: Le cri de guerre de ce champion jaillit de sa gueule tel le cor appelant les serviteurs de Khorne au combat.
fluff.it: L’urlo di guerra di questo campione erompe dalle sue labbra come lo squillo di un corno d’ottone che richiama in battaglia i servitori di Khorne.
fluff.ja: この筆頭戦士の雄叫びは真鍮の角笛のごとく轟き渡り、コーン神の従者たちを戦場へと駆り立てる。
fluff.ko: 이 용사의 입에서 터져 나오는 전투 함성은 마치 황동 나팔의 부름과도 같아 코온의 종복들을 전장으로 불러들인다.
fluff.zh: 这位勇士的怒吼就像是黄铜号角的召唤之声，恐虐的奴仆纷纷出现在战场。

target.en: That <k>LEGIONES DAEMONICA CHARACTER TZEENTCH</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Personnage</k> de <k>Tzeentch</k> des <k>Legiones Daemonica</k>.
target.ja: その<k>レギオネス・ディーモニカ・キャラクター・ティーンチ</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>逆理魔军角色奸奇</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA CHARACTER TZEENTCH unit (excluding MONSTER units) is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Legiones-Daemonica-Charaktermodell-Tzeentch-Einheit (ausgenommen Monster-Einheiten) zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad PERSONAJE TZEENTCH LEGIONES DAEMÓNICAS amiga (excepto MONSTRUO) se elija para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Personnage de Tzeentch des Legiones Daemonica amie (unités de Monstre exclues) est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Personaggio delle Legiones Daemonica di Tzeentch amica (escluse le unità Mostro) viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方レギオネス・ディーモニカ・キャラクター・ティーンチ・ユニット（モンスター・ユニットを除く）が射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 레기오네스 데모니카 캐릭터 친취 유닛(괴수 유닛 제외)이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，当一个己方逆理魔军角色奸奇单位（凶兽单位除外) 被选择进行射击。

effect.en: Your unit’s ranged attacks have <k>[LETHAL HITS]</k>.
effect.de: Die Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit haben <k>[Tödliche Treffer]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen <k>[Impactos letales]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir de votre unité ont <k>[Touches Fatales]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità hanno <k>Colpi Letali</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［会心ヒット］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的远程攻击拥有<k>[致命一击]</k>。

fluff.en: Shrieking kaleidoscopic sorceries caught by this entity’s talons are hurled in a gust of empyric fire, its mutating touch tearing open wounds into which the Warp’s lethal power can flow.
fluff.de: Ein kakophonisch kreischendes Kaleidoskop der feurigen Hexerei wird von den Krallen dieses Wesens entfacht und öffnet Risse im Warp, aus denen ungebändigte und tödliche Kraft fließt.
fluff.es: Las zarpas de este ente conjuran chillante hechicería caleidoscópica y la arrojan como llamarada empírea; su toque mutador abre heridas por las que se infiltra el letal poder de la disformidad.
fluff.fr: Une magie kaléidoscopique stridente saisie par les serres de cette entité est projetée en une gerbe de flammes empyréennes dont la caresse ouvre des plaies dans lesquelles la puissance mortelle du Warp peut se déverser.
fluff.it: Intessute dalle grinfie di quest’essere, stregonerie stridenti e caleidoscopiche vengono lanciate in uno sbuffo di fiamma empyrica, aprendo grazie al tocco mutageno ferite che lasciano passare il potere letale del Warp.
fluff.ja: この存在の鉤爪に染み付いた、金切り声のような音を立てる万色の魔術は超常の炎を噴出する。その変異魔術が犠牲者の傷口を引き裂くと、そこから歪みの恐るべき力を流し込んでいく。
fluff.ko: 이 존재는 갈퀴 돋친 손아귀에 괴성을 동반한 오색찬란한 마법을 거머쥐고서는, 이를 휘둘러 이계의 화염 폭풍을 일으킨다. 그 변이의 힘에 닿은 상처는 입을 활짝 벌리고, 그 사이로 워프의 치명적인 힘이 흘러든다.
fluff.zh: 那些被此实体攫住的万花筒般的巫术被裹挟在一股亚空间烈焰之中猛然掷出；致变的触碰撕裂开道道创口，任由亚空间的致命之力从中涌入。

name.ja: 終末の乗騎（アップグレード）

description.en: Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit only. This unit has +1" M.
description.de: Nur für eine berittene Legiones-Daemonica-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat +1" B.
description.es: Solo unidad Montada Legiones Daemónicas. Esta unidad tiene +1" a M.
description.fr: Unité montée des Legiones Daemonica seulement. Cette unité a +1" en M.
description.it: Solo unità In Sella delle Legiones Daemonica. Questa unità ha +1" M.

description.en: Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit only. When this unit is selected to fight, if this unit made a charge move this turn, you can use this ability. If you do, when determining which models in this unit can fight, friendly models that are within 3" of enemy units engaged with this unit can target those enemy units.
description.de: Nur für eine berittene Legiones-Daemonica-Einheit. Wenn diese Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird und in diesem Zug eine Angriffs­bewegung ausgeführt hat, kannst du diese Fähigkeit einsetzen. Wenn du dies tust, können, wenn du bestimmst, welche Modelle dieser Einheit kämpfen können, befreundete Modelle innerhalb von 3" um feindliche Einheiten im Nahkampf mit dieser Einheit jene Einheiten als Ziel wählen.
description.es: Solo unidad Montada Legiones Daemónicas. Cuando esta unidad se elija para combatir, si hizo un movimiento de carga en este turno, puedes usar esta habilidad. Si lo haces, al determinar qué miniaturas de esta unidad pueden combatir, las miniaturas amigas que estén a 3" o menos de unidades enemigas trabadas con esta unidad pueden tomar como blanco dichas unidades enemigas.
description.fr: Unité montée des Legiones Daemonica seulement. Quand cette unité finit un mouvement de charge, choisissez une unité ennemie engagée avec elle. L’unité ennemie choisie fait un jet d’ébranlement, avec -1 à ce jet.
description.it: Solo unità In Sella delle Legiones Daemonica. Quando questa unità viene scelta per combattere, se questa unità ha effettuato un movimento di carica in questo turno puoi usare questa abilità. Se lo fai, quando determini quali modelli di questa unità possono combattere, i modelli amici che si trovano entro 3" dalle unità nemiche ingaggiate con questa unità possono scegliere quelle unità nemiche come bersaglio.
description.ja: レギオネス・ディーモニカ・騎乗・ユニットのみ。このユニットが白兵を宣言した時、このユニットがこのターン中に突撃移動を行っていた場合、自軍はこのアビリティを使用できる。使用した場合、このユニット内の白兵を行える兵を決定する際、このユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニットの3mv以内に一部でも入っている味方の兵は、その敵ユニットを攻撃対象に選択できる。
description.ko: 레기오네스 데모니카 기승 유닛 전용. 이 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 이 유닛이 이번 턴에 돌격 이동을 수행했다면, 이 능력을 사용할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 이 유닛에서 백병전을 수행할 수 있는 모델을 정할 때, 이 유닛과 교전 상태인 적 유닛과 3" 내에 있는 아군 모델이 그 적 유닛을 지정할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限逆理魔军骑乘单位。当该单位被选择进行近战时，如果该单位在该回合进行了冲锋移动，您可以使用该技能。若使用，在判断该单位中哪些模型可以近战时，位于与该单位处于交战状态的敌方单位 3" 内的己方模型可以对那些敌方单位进行近战。
